title: psiguria trilobata
intro: Psiguria trilobata, also known as "Tribollo", is a climbing plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating infections, and alleviating respiratory issues. Psiguria trilobata is typically prepared as a tea or decoction, with some herbalists also using it in infusions and tinctures.
